3310180.name: Alex and the Aliens
3310180.description:
ALEX AND THE ALIENS: Collapse of Time is an action-adventure game that blends fast-paced combat, tactical decision-making, and mind-bending time manipulation in a post-apocalyptic future. Step into the shoes of Alex, a battle-hardened survivor, as you navigate a devastated Earth overrun by alien forces and mysterious time-bending technology.

In the aftermath of an invasion that nearly wiped out humanity, a strange signal begins to pulse from an abandoned research station in the heart of a crumbling city. Sent to investigate, you quickly discover that something - or someone - is attempting to reverse the invasion by tampering with the very fabric of time. But with alien drones and deadly mutants standing in your way, and the timeline itself hanging by a thread, every choice you make will shape the future - or destroy it.

Will you stop the collapse, or gamble on a complete reset of the timeline? The fate of what remains of humanity is in your hands.

Key Features:

  • Time-Bending Narrative: Dive into a gripping story where time itself becomes both your ally and your enemy. Unravel the mysteries of the past and the future as you confront a force capable of erasing all of existence.

  • Dynamic Combat: Engage in fast-paced, visceral combat with alien drones, mutated creatures, and other deadly foes. Utilize a variety of weapons, tactics, and quick thinking to survive the chaos.

  • Moral Choices with Consequences: Every major decision you make will impact the storyline and the future of the game’s world. Do you risk everything for a chance at salvation, or do you secure what remains of your reality?

  • Stealth & Strategy: Hack ancient security systems, avoid detection by patrolling enemies, and use the environment to your advantage as you infiltrate dangerous locations.

  • Puzzles & Exploration: Solve challenging puzzles to unlock the secrets of the alien time travel technology and uncover hidden lore in a world ravaged by war.

  • A Haunting World: Explore the remnants of a futuristic city, now a battleground of alien technology and human desperation. Every corner holds a new danger, and every discovery brings you closer to the truth.

ALEX AND THE ALIENS: Collapse of Time isn’t just about surviving - it’s about deciding the fate of the timeline itself. Will you repair the damage, or will you let everything fall apart and rewrite history? The future is in your hands.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
